# Measurement methods <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Jingle and jangle fallacies

- Same name, different constructs (jingle)
- Different names, same construct (jangle)

## Redundancy

- Bainbridge's work on measurement redundancy

## Ad hoc measure rate

- Prevalence of ad hoc measures and implications for trustworthiness

## Disattenuated associations

- Correcting for measurement error; implications when not done

## Reliability as a prerequisite to replicability

- Reliability "paradox"

## Pseudo effects

- Effects that arise from measurement artifacts rather than real phenomena

## Mode alignment

- Especially self-reported behavior
- Does the mode of measurement match the construct being assessed?
